name: Katharine Hepburn's Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt together butter and unsweetened chocolate in a saucepan.
2. Turn off the heat and stir in sugar, eggs, and vanilla. Beat the mixture well.
3. Stir in flour and salt. You may also add chopped walnuts at this point.
4. Pour the batter into an 8-inch-square pan that has been buttered and floured.
5. Bake at 325 degrees F for about 40 minutes.
